title: NA-ULIP
word_text:
URL: https://www.bajajallianzlife.com/life-insurance-guide/life/steps-for-buying-life-insurance.html
Steps on How to Buy a Life Insurance Policy
A life insurance policy can be a financial protection tool in your kitty that can help you and your family face emergencies. Moreover, with savings-oriented life insurance plans, you can save and create a corpus for your financial goals.
Given the importance of life insurance, it is recommended to buy a suitable policy that matches your needs. But how do you do that?
There are some simple steps to get life insurance easily and conveniently. Read on to know how to buy a life insurance policy.
What is life insurance?
A life insurance policy is a contract between a person and an insurance company in which the insurer provides financial protection to the insured in exchange for recurring payments, i.e., premiums.
According to the agreement, the insurance company will pay the individual or his family a lump sum payment after a specific period of time in the event of the policyholder's death or if the policy matures as per the conditions specified therein. There are various types of life insurance policies available to meet the demands and requirements of customers.
Steps to consider before buying life insurance
Before knowing how to get life insurance, there are various factors that you should consider before buying the policy. This will help you find the right plan and enjoy its full benefits. Given below are the primary steps that you need to consider when buying life insurance -
Step 1 - Identify the reasons you need life insurance for
Before buying a life insurance policy, find out the reasons for the same. In other words, identify your financial goals for which you would need life insurance plans. These goals can be financial protection or income replacement in your absence, child planning, retirement planning, saving up to buy a home, etc.
Knowing the reasons would help you choose the right type of life insurance plan that matches your needs.
Step 2 - Determine which sort of life insurance is most appropriate for you
After you know your goals or the reason for buying life insurance, assess the plans that would cater to your needs. For instance,
Child plans are suitable if you want to create a secure corpus for your child
If retirement planning is your goal, annuity plans would be a better fit
Choose ULIPs if you want to create a market-linked corpus for your goals
Choose traditional endowment or money-back plans if you want a stable corpus for your goals
Step 3 - Look for Insurers
The last step is to look for reputable insurance companies from which you can buy the selected plans. When comparing insurers, consider the range of plans offered, the features and benefits of the plans, premiums, claim settlement ratio, ease of purchase, etc. This would help you find the right insurer.
For instance, Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company is a leading life insurance provider with a wide variety of plans, attractive features and benefits and competitive premiums. It can be the right choice for all your insurance needs.
How to buy life insurance online & offline?
Now that you know how to find the right life insurance plans for your needs, the last step is buying the plan. To buy, there are two modes that you can choose from - online and offline. Let’s understand how to buy life insurance through each of these modes -
Offline mode
The offline mode means buying the life insurance policy physically through the insurance company or its intermediaries. Under this mode, you would have to fill out a physical proposal form, provide all your information, submit the relevant documents and pay the required premium.
Online mode
The online mode is a more convenient way of buying life insurance from anywhere and at any time. You can visit the insurer’s website or download its mobile application and buy a suitable policy right from the comfort of your home or office.
To buy the plan, you would have to fill out the online proposal form stating all the relevant details, upload your documents, and pay the premium digitally.
Key takeaways
A life insurance policy can be a useful protection tool that can help provide financial security and also allow you to create a corpus for your financial goals.
You can buy a life insurance plan online or offline.
Before buying a life insurance policy, analyse the needs for which you need the policy, compare and find the right plans that match your needs and then pick the insurer.
Buy the policy through any mode and enjoy the benefits that life insurance has to offer.
Wrapping Up
Assess your financial needs and find suitable life insurance plans that can cater to them. Choose a suitable policy with adequate coverage and enjoy the financial protection that life insurance offers. You can also choose savings and investment-oriented life insurance plans to create a corpus for your financial goals. Whatever plan you choose, buy it easily online or offline, depending on your preference. The steps to buy life insurance are easy. Just follow them and buy the right plan.
FAQs
Is a Medical Test Always Required to Get Life Insurance?
The requirement of a medical test depends on your age, medical history, sum assured selected, and other factors. Some individuals might have to undergo medical tests every time they buy a life insurance plan. However, some individuals might get the policy without any check-up. So, the requirement of medical tests depends on the proposer and the underlying risks.
Is It Possible to Purchase Life Insurance Online Without an Agent?
Yes, you can purchase life insurance online through the insurer’s website without the intermediation of an agent.
Which Documents Are Needed to Apply for a Life Insurance Policy?
The documents needed to buy life insurance depend on the type of policy selected and the proposer’s details. That being said, some of the common documents include the identity proof, address proof, age proof, KYC documents, and latest photographs.
Disclaimer:
IN THIS POLICY, THE INVESTMENT RISK IN INVESTMENT PORTFOLIO IS BORNE BY THE POLICYHOLDER
The Unit Linked Insurance Products do not offer any liquidity during the first five years of the contract. The policyholder will not be able to surrender or withdraw the monies invested in Unit Linked Insurance Products completely or partially till the end of the fifth year.
ULIPs are different from the traditional insurance products and are subject to the risk factors. The premium paid in ULIPs are subject to investment risks associated with capital markets and the NAVs of the units may go up or down based on the performance of fund and factors influencing the capital market and the insured is responsible for his/her decisions. Please know the associated risks and the applicable charges, from your Insurance agent or the Intermediary or policy document issued by the insurance company. The various funds offered under this contract are the names of the funds and do not in any way indicate the quality of these plans, their future prospects and returns.
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Steps on How to Buy a Life Insurance Policy
A life insurance plan can be a financial protection tool in your kitty that can help you and your family tackle with financial emergencies. Moreover, with savings-oriented life insurance plans, you can save and create a corpus for your financial goals.
Given the importance of life insurance, it is recommended to buy a suitable policy that matches your needs. But how do you do that?
There are some simple steps to get life insurance easily and conveniently. Read on to know how to buy a life insurance policy.
What is life insurance?
A life insurance policy is a contract between a person and an insurance company in which the insurer provides financial protection to the insured in exchange for recurring payments, i.e., premiums.
According to the agreement, the insurance company will pay the individual or his family a lump sum payment after a specific period of time in the event of the policyholder's death or if the policy matures as per the conditions specified therein. There are various types of life insurance policies available to meet the demands and requirements of customers.
Steps to consider before buying life insurance
Before knowing how to get life insurance, there are various factors that you should consider before buying the policy. This will help you find the right plan and enjoy its full benefits. Given below are the primary steps that you need to consider when buying life insurance -
Step 1 - Identify the reasons you need life insurance for
Before buying a life insurance policy, find out the reasons for the same. In other words, identify your financial goals for which you would need life insurance plans. These goals can be financial protection or income replacement in your absence, child planning, retirement planning, saving up to buy a home, etc.
Knowing the reasons would help you choose the right type of life insurance plan that matches your needs.
Step 2 - Determine which life insurance plan is most appropriate for you
After you know your financial goals or the reason for buying life insurance, assess the plans that would cater to your needs. For instance,
● Child insurance plans are suitable if you want to create a secure corpus for your child ● If retirement planning is your goal, annuity plans would be a better fit ● Choose ULIPs if you want life cover along with a market-linked corpus for your goals ● Choose endowment or money-back plans if you want a stable corpus for your goals
Step 3 - Look for Insurers
The last step is to look for reputable insurance companies from which you can buy the selected plans. When comparing insurers, consider the range of plans offered, the features and benefits of the plans, premiums, claim settlement ratio, ease of purchase, etc. This would help you find the right insurer.
For instance, Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company is a leading life insurance provider with a wide variety of plans, attractive features and benefits and competitive premiums. It can be the right choice for all your life insurance needs.
How to buy life insurance online & offline?
Now that you know how to find the right life insurance plan for your needs, the last step is buying the plan. To buy, there are two modes that you can choose from - online and offline. Let’s understand how to buy life insurance through each of these modes - Offline mode The offline mode means buying the life insurance policy physically through the insurance company or its intermediaries. Under this mode, you would have to fill out a physical proposal form, provide all your information, and submit the relevant documents. The insurer would underwrite the policy and after approval you can pay the required premium. Online mode The online mode is a more convenient way of buying life insurance from anywhere and at any time. You can visit the insurer’s website or download its mobile application and buy a suitable policy right from the comfort of your home or office. To buy the plan, you would have to fill out the online proposal form stating all the relevant details, upload your documents, and get the plan underwritten. After the underwriting team approves the proposal, pay the premium to get the plan.
Key takeaways
● A life insurance plan can be a useful financial protection tool that can help provide financial security and also allow you to create a corpus for your financial goals. ● You can buy a life insurance plan online or offline. ● Before buying a life insurance policy, analyse the financial needs for which you need the plan, compare and find the right plans that match your financial needs and then pick the insurer. ● Buy the policy and enjoy the benefits that life insurance has to offer.
Wrapping Up
Assess your financial needs and find suitable life insurance plans that can cater to them. Choose a suitable plan with adequate coverage and enjoy the financial protection that life insurance offers. You can choose from plans such as a savings oriented life insurance plan , term insurance plans , ULIPs etc to create a corpus for your financial goals. Whatever plan you choose, buy it easily online or offline, depending on your preference. The steps to buy life insurance are easy. Just follow them and buy the right plan. FAQs
Is a Medical Test Always Required to Get Life Insurance? The requirement of a medical test depends on your age, medical history, sum assured selected, and other factors. The requirement of medical tests depends on the Insurer and the underlying risks. Is It Possible to Purchase Life Insurance Online Without an Agent? Yes, you can purchase life insurance online through the insurer’s website without the intermediation of an agent. Which Documents Are Needed to Apply for a Life Insurance Policy? The documents needed to buy life insurance depend on the type of policy selected and the proposer’s details. That being said, some of the common documents include the identity proof, address proof, age proof, income proof, and latest photographs. Disclaimer:

ULIPs are different from the traditional insurance products and are subject to the risk factors. The premium paid in ULIPs are subject to investment risks associated with capital markets and the NAVs of the units may go up or down based on the performance of fund and factors influencing the capital market and the insured is responsible for his/her decisions. Please know the associated risks and the applicable charges, from your Insurance agent or the Intermediary or policy document issued by the insurance company.
